SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-22-2022 - JUDGMENT.

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF KWAN, MAN YUEN ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL (AGENT FOR SERVICE: LINDA MASON) FILED BY PLAINTIFF KWAN, MAN YUEN AS TO DEFENDANT SFHA HOUSING CORPORATION

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-22-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-22-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF MAN YUEN KWAN IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED CANTONESE INTERPRETER AMANDA PEETERS. DEFENDANT SFHA HOUSING CORPORATION IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY ZACHARY KEENAN, LEGAL CLERK. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KWAN, MAN YUEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SFHA HOUSING CORPORATION $2,400.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,400.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
